name: _DoIP_UDPDataInd
title: _DoIP_UDPDataInd
description: An UDP packet was received that cannot be interpreted by this DoIP implementation. The senders IP address is given as first argument, in text form.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: Address in text form, e.g. “169.254.32.1” (IPv4) or “2001::1” (IPv6).

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The raw data received, including complete header, if present.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
